ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor who played the character */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the house the character belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or position of the character */,
  "alive" INTEGER /* Whether the character is alive or dead */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the character */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the character's image */,
  "episodes_appeared" INTEGER /* Number of episodes the character appeared in */,
  "first_appearance" TEXT /* First appearance of the character in the series */,
  "last_appearance" TEXT /* Last appearance of the character in the series */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the actor's image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the actor */,
  "awards_won" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the actor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "episode_name" TEXT /* Name of the episode */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the episode */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the episode in minutes */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the episode */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Writer(s) of the episode */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the episode */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Synopsis of the episode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_actor" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor who played the character */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the actor started playing the character */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the actor stopped playing the character (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_episodes" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the character appeared in */,
  "appearance_type" TEXT /* Type of appearance (e.g., main, minor, guest) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_relationships" (
  "character_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first character */,
  "character_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second character */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the characters (e.g., friend, family, enemy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id1", "character_id2")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forum was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forum was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum the post was made in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the post has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the post has received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment was made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES forum_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., page views, user engagement) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was tracked */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data (e.g., website, app) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Actor, Best Drama) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_awards" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award won by the actor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id", "award_id")
)
